assertions: The agent used the Read tool to read /workspace/context-dump.md
The agent used the Read tool to read /workspace/context/00-IDENTITY.md
The agent used the Read tool to read /workspace/context/01-SOUL.md
The output contains the literal string '# Andy' from the identity file
The output contains the literal string '# Soul' from the soul file
The output contains verbatim JSON from the snapshots directory
The output is longer than 100 lines (not a short summary)
The output does NOT contain summarizing language like 'The agent is configured to' or 'Here is a summary'
